name: run_linter
description: Runs a code linter command on the project (e.g., eslint, flake8, rubocop). The specific linter command must be provided. Returns linter output, including errors and warnings.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project.

command.description: The linter command to execute (e.g., 'npm run lint', 'eslint . --fix', 'flake8 .').

working_directory.description: Optional subdirectory within project_path where the command should be run. Defaults to project_path itself.

auto_fix.description: If true and the linter supports it, attempt to automatically fix linting issues. The command itself should reflect this intent if necessary (e.g. by including a '--fix' flag).

hints.destructive: Depends on auto_fix and linter. Can be destructive if auto_fix is true.
hints.description: Runs a linter. Can modify files if auto_fix is enabled and the linter command supports it.
